thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, leader-continuation alpha works in dispersed regimes but its internal composition must shift between momentum-heavy in dispersed-up and defensive low-vol grinder in broad-up; carry-dislocation alpha works in dispersed-down and compressed regimes; contrarian laggard tilt works only in broad-down regimes and must be strictly gated there to avoid diluting the dispersed-regime signals
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names higher by blending two adaptive sub-signals (regime-adaptive leader and carry-dislocation) plus a strictly-gated contrarian tilt: leader internal composition shifts from momentum-heavy to defensive low-vol grinder as cross-sectional dispersion falls in positive median regimes, carry receives weight in dispersed-down and compressed regimes, and contrarian is activated only when dispersion is low and median momentum is negative
thesis_profile.factor_formula: compute two name-level sub-scores (a regime-adaptive leader sub-score that smoothly blends momentum-heavy and defensive-quality forms based on broad-up regime intensity, plus a carry-dislocation sub-score) and a strictly-gated contrarian sub-score; allocate weights using per-timestamp dispersion of |momentum_20| and sign of median momentum_20 with contrarian only firing in low-dispersion negative-median regimes
